candidates.why: This is the only operating D&A line clearly tied to the COGS bucket, but it appears directly as a sub-component of Production Costs / Cost of revenues/COGS. Since the selected COGS final_choice is the parent total row 'Cost of revenues/COGS', this D&A appears already embedded and should not be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is [Income Statement] Cost of revenues/COGS. 'Depreciation/Amortization in production cost' is presented as a nested component within that bucket, so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Although this is an operating D&A line related to overhead, its placement beneath 'Selling and distribution costs' indicates it is a component of the already selected SG&A bucket rather than a separate same-level line to add later.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization Expense in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is a component of the selected 'Development costs' row. Also, 'Development costs' was already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding R&D D&A separately would conflict with the stated R&D handling and risk distortion/double counting.
This appears directly as a sub-component of the selected parent row 'Management and administrative costs', so it is already embedded in the chosen XSGA bucket and should not be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket is the combination of Selling and distribution costs + Development costs + Management and administrative costs. The visible D&A rows are presented as components within those selected parent rows, not as separate same-level operating expense lines. Per the special R&D rule, do not add the R&D D&A line because Development costs is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
